paloma.name: Paloma
instructions: Combine the tequila, lime juice, and salt in a tall glass. Add ice, top off with diet grapefruit soda, and stir.

pancakes-with-cheese-in-the-pan-argiro.name: Pancakes With Cheese In The Pan
instructions: In a deep pan, heat the olive oil over medium to strong heat.
Add 1 cup of noodle and sauce for 5-6 minutes until it turns brown and removes all its flavors.
Add the rest of the noodle and add the broth or hot water.
Lower and simmer for a few minutes to soften the pasta and stay with some sauce.
We mix regularly.
Add salt and pepper and add the kefalotyr while still juicy.
Remove and mix to melt the cheese.
Serve immediately with extra grated cheese.
In summer, rub some fresh tomato in the serving.

pancit-molo-filipino-wonton-soup.name: Pancit Molo (filipino Wonton Soup)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mix pork, shrimp, water chestnuts, salt, and pepper together in a large bowl. Reserve 1/3 of the filling mixture for soup. Wrap about 1 tablespoon of remaining filling in a wonton wrapper. Repeat until all filling is used up.

Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté until onion is translucent, about 5 minutes. Stir in chicken and reserved filling. Mix well. Add chicken broth; season with salt and pepper. Bring to a boil. Drop filled wontons into soup one by one. Boil until wontons float to the top, 3 to 5 minutes. Add bok choy; boil until tender, about 2 minutes more. Garnish with green onions.

panda-rice-with-hot-dog-and-corn-lezzet.name: Panda Rice With Hot Dog And Corn
instructions: 1. Wash Pirinci.
2. Wait for 10 minutes in salty warm water and drain water.
3. Heat the sunflower oil in the pan with the butter.
4. Add and roast the sausage that you eat in the size of the backbone.
5. Add rice on it and roast.
6. 2 cups add hot water, salt and corn.
7. After boiling, cook in jealous fire.
8. Close the top with paper towel and pot cover for squeezing when the brass is cooked and rest for 20 minutes.
9. Share the rice to the service plates in round.
10. Do two ears.
11. 11. Place and decorate black olive grains on their eyes and ears.
12. Serve lips with redbiber.

parsley-kale-and-berry-smoothie.name: Parsley, Kale, And Berry Smoothie
instructions: Purée ingredients with 1 cup water in a blender until smooth (add water if too thick).

pate.name: Pate
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix braunschweiger liver sausage, cream cheese, onion, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, salt and pepper. Form into a ball shape. Wrap with plastic wrap. Chill in the refrigerator at least 1 hour before serving.

peach-and-cucumber-salad.name: Peach And Cucumber Salad

ingredients.item: A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast pumpkin seeds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown and slightly puffed, 5–7 minutes; let cool. Transfer to a small bowl and toss with 1 Tbsp. oil; season with salt.

Meanwhile, toast cardamom, clove, coriander, and cumin in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing occasionally, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Remove seeds from cardamom pod; discard pod. Finely grind seeds along with other spices in spice mill or with mortar and pestle. Mix in a large bowl with chile, garlic, parsley, chopped cilantro, lemon juice, and remaining ¼ cup oil; season with salt. Add cucumber and toss. Let sit 5 minutes.
Add peaches, avocado, and half of the pumpkin seeds to cucumber mixture and season generously with salt; toss to coat. Taste and adjust seasoning with more salt and/or lemon juice.
Serve topped with sesame seeds, cilantro leaves, and remaining pumpkin seeds.

peanut-butter-and-banana-dog-biscuits.name: Peanut Butter And Banana Dog Biscuits
instructions: Preheat oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Lightly grease a baking sheet.

Stir together the egg, peanut butter, banana, and honey in a medium bowl; blend thoroughly. Stir in the flour and wheat germ; mix well. Turn dough out onto a floured board and roll to 1/4 inch thick. Cut into desired shapes with a cookie cutter, place on prepared baking sheet, and brush tops with egg white.
Bake biscuits in preheated oven until dried and golden brown, about 30 minutes, depending on size. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.

peanut-butter-and-jelly-ice-cream-sandwi.name: Peanut Butter And Jelly Ice Cream Sandwiches
instructions: Prepare the peanut butter ice cream and let harden in the freezer for about 6 hours.

Prepare the dough for peanut butter cookies and divide the dough into 16 walnut-size balls. Proceed with the recipe from there, baking the cookies 10 to 12 minutes at 350 degrees. Let cool completely.
To assemble the ice cream sandwiches remove the ice cream from the freezer and let it stand at room temperature for about 5 minutes to soften slightly.

Spread a layer of jam on the flat side of each peanut butter cookie. Place a scoop of peanut butter ice cream in the center of half the cookies, on top of the jam. Top with the remaining cookies, jam side down. Gently squeeze the cookies together until the ice cream and jam come to the edges of the cookies. Put the ice cream sandwiches back in the freezer for at least 15 minutes to harden the jam. These can be made 2 days ahead. Place them in a large plastic storage bag or airtight container and store in freezer.

peanut-butter-and-jelly-overnight-oats.name: Peanut Butter And Jelly Overnight Oats
instructions: Whisk together almond milk, oats, 1/4 cup peanut butter, chia seeds, maple syrup, and salt in a bowl. Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Before serving, stir in strawberry preserves, remaining peanut butter, and more maple syrup if needed. Top with sliced strawberries and slivered almonds.

pears-with-orange-sauce-lezzet.name: Pears With Orange Sauce
instructions: 1. Peel the shells of the pears and remove the core beds in the lower parts of the pumpkin.
2. Eat 10 minutes in lemon water.
3. Peel the shell of apples and chop it in the form of small cube.
4. Add sugar, cinnamon, nuts and fill in the inside of pears.
5. Armutes index to oven container.
6. Cover the carngarine on them with aluminum foil and cook for 20 minutes in the oven set to 180 degrees.
7. Cut the dough into strips and wrap on the legumes.
8. Place the egg yolk and put it in the oven and continue cooking until it is fraught.
9. Take sugar and water in the pot.
10. Cook until Karamelleşince.
11. 11. Add butter.
12. Mix and add starch with orange juice and leave boiling.
12. August Add to the cream and get from the stove.
14 July Place the pears in bowls.
15. Take care of the service.

pecan-monkey-bread.name: Pecan Monkey Bread
instructions: Place cream in a small saucepan and scrape in vanilla seeds. Heat over medium until just simmering, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat.

Whisk yolks and granulated sugar in a medium bowl until pale and light, about 2 minutes. Gradually whisk half of cream into yolk mixture. Then whisk mixture in bowl back into cream in saucepan. Cook over medium-low, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon, until sauce is thickened and coats spoon, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a medium bowl; let cool.
__DO AHEAD:__Sauce can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before serving.
Preheat oven to 350°. Coat muffin cups with nonstick spray. Toast pecans on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing occasionally, until slightly darkened and fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Let cool; coarsely chop.

Stir granulated sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl; set aside. Bring brown sugar, butter, and ½ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Pour syrup into muffin cups. Top with pecans and raisins.

Gently roll out pastry on a lightly floured surface just to smooth. For a 14-oz. package, fold sheet in half. For a 17.3-oz. package, stack sheets. Cut pastry into an 8x6 grid to make 48 squares. Roll into balls; toss in cinnamon sugar. Fill muffin cups with balls; press lightly to compact.
Bake until pastry is golden brown and puffed, 25–30 minutes. Let cool slightly, but unmold before caramel hardens.
Serve monkey bread, caramel side up, on a pool of crème anglaise.

penne-with-chicken-teleculinaria.name: Penne With Chicken

ingredients.item: Sal e mistura de 3 pimentas q.b.

instructions: Cut the chicken breasts into cubes and season them with some chopped garlic, lemon juice, thyme leaves, salt and mixture of 3 peppers.
Light a pot with water and salt and let it boil. Add the dough and a thread of the olive oil, stir and let it cook. Drain, pass cold water and book on a drainer.

Retire a pele e as sementes aos tomates e corte-os em cubos. Leve ao lume um tacho com o restante azeite, o louro, os restantes alhos e a cebola, picados, e deixe alourar ligeiramente, mexendo de vez em quando. Junte o frango e, minutos depois, o tomate. Mexa e deixe cozinhar um pouco.

Then add the hot chicken broth, the washed spinach leaves and the cream. Season with saffron, paprika, salt and mixture of 3 peppers and stir. Remove from the fire, retrieve the seasonings, discard the laurel leaf and wrap with the dough. Serve right away.

pepecura-lezzet.name: Pepecura
instructions: 1. Wash the black grape thoroughly.
2. Boil in a pot with water.
3. Add dust sugar and boil for 5 minutes.
4. Depress water by pressing your hands.
5. 1 cup from grape juice and mix with starch.
6. Make it smooth.
7. Add to the remaining grape juice and cook constantly stirring.
8. Hotly share small bowls or molds.
9. Well cool in the refrigerator and reverse to the serving plate.
10. Decorate and serve with grapes.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

persian-steamed-white-rice-chelo.name: Persian Steamed White Rice (chelo)

ingredients.item: -inch canola oil poured into the bottom of the saucepan

instructions: 1. Fill a large nonstick saucepan (at least 6 quarts) with 12 cups water; add oil and salt. Cover and bring to a brisk boil over high heat.
2. Add the rice and continue cooking over medium to high heat, stirring occasionally.

3. After 3-5 minutes, use a slotted spoon to scoop some grains from the water. Break one grain in half to make sure it is "al dente" (see above). Turn off the heat and pour rice into the colander to drain; set aside.
1. Place the empty 6-quart saucepan back onto the stovetop over medium heat. Add 1/4-inch canola oil and 2 tablespoons water. Add turmeric and/or saffron powder. Stir together.
2. Add the drained rice and shape it into a pyramid. Cover the pot and cook for 5-7 minutes until rice begins to steam.
3. Uncover and place 2 paper towels (one on top of the other) over the rice. The ends will extend outside the pot. Replace the lid tightly.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 45 minutes. Turn off the heat and tilt the lid until ready to serve.

5. With a wide spatula, scoop the rice from the pot, making sure not to disturb the crust (tadig) that formed on the bottom of the pot. Serve the rice on a flat serving platter, mounding it into the shape of a pyramid. Turn the tadig out onto a flat serving platter by inverting the pot, as you would invert a cake pan, or cut it into pieces and serve around the rice.
1. To make saffron water, mix together 1 teaspoon crushed saffron threads and 1/4 cup hot water. Steep for a few minutes, until the water becomes yellow.
2. Mix saffron water with steamed white rice. Use this intensely yellow rice to make designs on the Chelo.

Pour 1/2 cup water mixed with 1/4 cup canola oil onto the pyramid in a large pot. You can also freeze this rice, as long as you do not stir it until it is completely defrosted. You can even cook it, freeze it, and later steam it as it defrosts. I know I will have to spend time in "rice hell" for admitting to freezing Persian rice, but it is worth it to make my life easier!

pesto-asparagus-and-sun-dried-tomato-pas.name: Pesto Asparagus And Sun-dried Tomato Pasta
instructions: Preheat oven to 425˚F/220˚C.
In a large pot, bring 4 quarts of water to a rolling boil.

Remove the woody ends of the asparagus and discard. Cut the remaining spears into quarters and place on a baking sheet. Drizzle olive oil, salt, and pepper over the asparagus and toss so each piece is evenly coated. Bake for 10 minutes.
In the boiling water, cook the penne for 10–12 minutes, or until al dente, and drain.
Using a blender or food processor, blend basil, pine nuts, garlic, and olive oil until it becomes a paste. Add in Parmesan and salt and blend.
In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, sun-dried tomatoes, roasted asparagus, and pesto (about 3 hefty tablespoons). Toss together and serve hot or cold, and top with Parmesan cheese.
Enjoy!

pesto-turkey-pinwheels.name: Pesto Turkey Pinwheels
instructions: Warm the tortillas in the microwave in 30-second intervals, until flexible. Transfer to a clean work surface.
Spread on half the pesto on each tortilla.
Divide the tomatoes, turkey, spinach, and provolone between the tortillas.
Wrap the tortillas tightly in plastic wrap and rest for 30 minutes.
Stick 6 toothpicks 1-inch (2.5 cm) apart into the wraps along the seam.
Slice between the toothpicks and serve.
Enjoy!

pickled-broccoli-recipe-lezzet.name: Pickled Broccoli Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cup vinegar (can be selected or preferred)
1 teaspoon of powder sugar (optional, softens flavor)
1 dessert spoon hardal seeds or chalk seeds (optional)

instructions: 1. Brokoliyi smallerdisconnect, wash and strain.
2. Carrot preparation them in fine slices.
3. Water, vinegar, salt and sugar small boil in a pot.
4. After boiling, leave the stove and cool.
5. Place brocoli flower, carrot slices, butter and drink in a clean jar.
6. The healthy cold pickled water of vegetables in the jar is poured from u.
7. Make sure the materials of the water stay in the interior
8. Close the jar and wait for 3–5 room temperature.
9. Then take the refrigerator to the long time was you can put it.

pickled-pork-loin-recipe-comedera.name: Pickled Pork Loin Recipe
pickled-pork-loin-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de lomo de cerdo en escabeche

ingredients.item: 2  vasos de vinagre de manzana o de sidra

instructions: Corta el lomo en lonjas o rodajas con muy poco grosor. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Pela muy bien los dientes de ajo y filetea.
Warm a frying pan with some olive oil and scattering steamed garlic teeth for 3 minutes, get them to get low and low.
Retira los dientes de ajo y reserva.
In that same frying pan, add a little more olive oil and seal the pork loin sliced from both sides till it's doradito. It'll take about 10 minutes.
Calienta en una olla o cazuela el vinagre de sidra o manzana hasta que entibie.
Incorpora en un recipiente de cristal las rebanadas de lomo de cerdo sellado y agrega las dos hojas de laurel.
Incorpora los dientes de ajo salteados y la pimienta entera.
Vierte el vinagre tibio y el aceite de oliva. Mezcla un poco, tapa y deja marinado por 12 horas aproximadamente.
After that time, you can serve the pork's back as an escabechis alone or with a vinegar or a reduction of balsamic vinegar.
Enjoy!

pickled-strawberries.name: Pickled Strawberries
instructions: Place strawberries in a 1-qt. heatproof jar. Bring vinegar, sugar, salt, and ⅔ cup water to a boil in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugar and salt. Pour over strawberries. Let cool; cover and chill.
Do Ahead: Strawberries can be pickled 5 days ahead. Keep chilled.

pickletini.name: Pickletini
instructions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice; add vodka and pickle juice.
Cover and shake until the outside of the shaker has frosted.
Strain into a martini glass; garnish with pickle slices on a swizzle stick.

pineapple-cream-teleculinaria.name: Pineapple Cream
instructions: Peel the pineapple, cut it in half, remove the toughest central part of it and then cut it into cubes. Lay them in a pot, add 80 g of sugar and bring to the heat, stirring regularly, until the pineapple becomes soft.
Remove from the fire, let it cool down and lie in a bowl. Book a piece to decorate at the end.
In another pot, pour the milk, condensed milk and yolks, stir very well and bring to the fire until thicken. Remove from the fire, lie on the pineapple and let it cool.

In a bowl, beat the clears in castle, adding the remaining sugar gradually. On the other hand, whip cream into whipped cream. Then gently wrap it with the clear ones. Have it on the condensed cream, decorate with the pineapple that you have reserved and bring to the cold until serving.

pink-grapefruit-margaritas.name: Pink Grapefruit Margaritas
instructions: To make the simple syrup, bring the sugar and water to a boil in a saucepan. Wait until they’re completely combined, then set aside to cool.
Squeeze the juice out of all the grapefruits, and combine with the tequila and the simple syrup you just made.
Wet the rim of your glasses (you can do this with a slice of grapefruit), and dip in sugar. Serve over ice!
Enjoy!

pistachio-and-honey-ice-cream-lezzet.name: Pistachio And Honey Ice Cream
pistachio-and-honey-ice-cream-lezzet.original_name: Antep Peanut And Ball Ice Cream
instructions: 1. thoroughly crush half and sugar in the kitchen robot.
2. Transfer the milk to a pot of sugar, which you take on the cream, rose water and the robot.
3. Bake with stirring together for 20 minutes on the ground fire.
4. Take the pot from the stove and cool with the mixer.
5. Add the slippery to the mixture of orange peel, honey and remaining peanuts.
6. Mix with Spatula and transfer a rough.
7. Wait for at least 6 hours in the ice.

pistachio-ice-cream-dessert.name: Pistachio Ice Cream Dessert

ingredients.item: Container frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine cracker crumbs and melted butter in a bowl. Mix until evenly moistened; press into the bottom and sides of a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust lightly browned and smells toasted, about 15 minutes. Remove from the oven and cool.

Combine ice cream, milk, and pudding mix in a bowl; spread evenly onto prepared crust. Spread whipped topping over ice cream mixture; top with toffee bits. Place in freezer until hardened, at least 1 hour.

pizza-with-onion-and-provolone.name: Pizza With Onion And Provolone
instructions: Combine 5 tsp. kosher salt and 3 Tbsp. water in a small bowl and stir to dissolve salt; set aside.

Whisk bread and spelt flours and yeast in a large bowl to combine. Add 3 Tbsp. oil and 3 cups room-temperature water; mix with a rubber spatula until a large shaggy mass forms. Knead in bowl until dough forms a rough ball, about 4 minutes. Let rest, uncovered, 10 minutes.

Add reserved salt water to dough and knead until water is incorporated (dough will be very wet and shaggy), 5–10 minutes. Generously oil a bowl that is at least twice as big as dough and place dough in bowl; cover with plastic wrap. Let rest at room temperature 30 minutes.

Transfer dough to a clean work surface and fold in half over itself 3 times, turning 90° after each fold. Return to oiled bowl, arranging seam side down. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and chill dough overnight (it should double in size).

Place dough on a lightly floured surface and divide in half. Lightly flour tops of dough. Working with 1 piece at a time, fold each corner into center of dough. Rotate 90° and repeat process until you have a neat ball. Turn dough, seam side down. Generously flour two 18x13" rimmed baking sheets and place a ball on each baking sheet. Cover each with a damp kitchen towel. Set in a warm spot; let rise until dough is very relaxed, supple, and doubled in size, 2–3 hours.

Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 500°. Transfer dough balls to a work surface and lightly oil baking sheets. Lightly flour work surface and set 1 ball of dough on top, seam side up. Release some air by pressing down into dough with your fingers. Stretch dough; continue working with your fingers until it is about the same size as baking sheets. Transfer to a baking sheet and stretch to fit, pressing into corners. Repeat with remaining ball of dough.

Scatter provolone over dough. Top with onions, then mozzarella. Drizzle with oil; season with kosher salt. Bake pizzas, rotating top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until crust is golden brown and onions are charred in spots, 12–15 minutes.
To serve, drizzle pizzas with more oil and season with sea salt and pepper; cut into squares.

plant-based-black-bean-taco-soup.name: Plant-based Black Bean Taco Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add onion, bell peppers, celery, carrots, jalapeno peppers, and garlic; cook until veggies soften, 3 to 5 minutes.

Add diced tomatoes; stir well and cook for 3 minutes. Add vegetable broth, black and pinto beans, corn, cumin, chili powder, paprika, and salt; stir until well combined. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes.

plum-jam-argiro.name: Plum Jam
instructions: We clean the plums first from the pits.
Cut the orange peels into very thin sticks like matches.
In a pot, add the vinegar, orange peels, juice, sugar and spices, coriander and cinnamon.
Bring them to a boiling point, medium to high heat.
When the liquid boils and the sugar melts, add the plums and lower the heat to medium to low.
Simmer for about 15 to 20 minutes to soften but not melt.
Remove the plums and orange peels with a drill and pour them into a sterile jar.
Continue boiling for a few minutes until it thickens.
We're throwing in the flowerwater.
Add the hot syrup, plums and peels.
Keep the jam in the refrigerator after it cools.

poached-pears-with-cardamom-and-saffron.name: Poached Pears With Cardamom And Saffron
instructions: Gently crush cardamom with a rolling pin or the bottom of a skillet to slightly crack open pods without releasing seeds. Combine cardamom, wine, sugar, lemon juice, saffron, and salt in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring until sugar dissolves. Bring to a simmer. Add pears; add water if needed to completely submerge pears. Cover with lid slightly ajar and simmer, turning occasionally, until pears are tender but not mushy, about 30 minutes.

Using a slotted spoon, transfer pears to a plate. Increase heat and boil poaching liquid until reduced to 1 cup, 10–15 minutes. DO AHEAD: Can be made 8 hours ahead. Cover and refrigerate pears. Let syrup stand at room temperature. Rewarm syrup before continuing.
Spoon some of syrup over cold or room-temperature pears. Serve with a dollop of crème fraîche; pass remaining syrup.

pocky-smores.name: Pocky S'mores
instructions: Open the packet of Pocky and the bag of marshmallows.

Carefully skewer several marshmallows (depending on their size) onto each Pocky. It may be easier to make a hole in the marshmallows using a skewer before threading them onto the Pocky, as the Pocky are prone to breaking. Do not overload the Pocky, as they may break under the weight of the marshmallows. The marshmallows can also catch fire, so leave enough Pocky to keep a safe distance from your hand and the marshmallows should this occur.
Using your stove, a kitchen blowtorch, or, preferably, an open fire, toast the marshmallows, being careful not to burn the marshmallows or yourself. Allow to cool slightly before devouring.

pomelo-salad-with-chile-lime-peanuts-and.name: Pomelo Salad With Chile, Lime, Peanuts, And Coconut

ingredients.item: Palm sugar or light brown sugar
Torn cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Whisk palm sugar and 1 Tbsp. water in a medium bowl to dissolve sugar. Whisk in chiles, garlic, lime juice, and fish sauce; season with salt. Balance with more sugar, lime juice, or fish sauce if needed.
Toast coconut in a dry small saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl.
Heat oil in same saucepan. Add half of shallots and fry, swirling, until golden brown and crisp, about 3 minutes. Transfer to paper towels with a slotted spoon to drain; season with salt.
Cook peanuts in shallot oil until golden brown, about 2 minutes. Transfer to paper towels to drain; season with salt.

Remove peel and white pith from pomelos. Tear membrane off and pull segments into large pieces, transferring to a large bowl as you go. Add cilantro, remaining shallots, and half of dressing and toss to coat. Add coconut, peanuts, and dried shrimp; toss again. Divide among plates, drizzle with remaining dressing, and top with fried shallots.

poppy-seed-chicken-casserole.name: Poppy Seed Chicken Casserole

ingredients.item: Sleeve buttery round crackers (such as ritz®)

instructions: Place chicken breasts into a large pot; cover with water and bring to a boil over high heat. Reduce heat to medium, cover, and simmer until chicken is no longer pink in the center, about 20 minutes. Drain; shred chicken with two forks.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Mix crackers, melted butter, and poppy seeds together in a large bowl until combined; set aside.
Stir condensed soup and sour cream together in a medium bowl; pour 1/2 of the mixture into a 9-inch square baking dish.
Add shredded chicken in an even layer.
Top with remaining soup mixture. Sprinkle with Cheddar cheese.
Top with cracker mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheese has melted and the sauce is bubbly, 25 to 30 minutes.

pork-belly-burnt-ends.name: Pork Belly Burnt Ends

ingredients.item: Fruit wood or other wood pieces

instructions: Preheat a smoker to an internal temp of approximately 113°C (113 degrees C). Add wood pieces once temperature has been reached.

Place pork belly pieces into a large mixing bowl. Sprinkle 1/4 cup dry rub on top and toss vigorously with your hands until all pieces are thoroughly coated. Arrange evenly on a wire mesh baking tray, spacing carefully so pieces don't touch one another.

Place tray into the preheated smoker. Smoke for 3 1/2 hours at a temperature range between 235 and 121°C (113 to 121 degrees C). If you have not already done so, add wood pieces to the fire so it is producing smoke.
Remove the tray from the smoker. Using gloved hands, carefully transfer pork to an aluminum foil pan, arranging pieces so they are uniformly level.
Evenly distribute brown sugar, honey, butter, 1/2 cup barbecue sauce, apple juice, jam, and remaining dry rub over the pork. Cover and seal the pan with aluminum foil.
Return the pan to the smoker and smoke for 2 more hours at a target temperature of 121°C (121 degrees C).

Remove the pan from the smoker and remove the foil lid. Carefully transfer the individual pieces from the braising liquid into a new, clean foil pan and drizzle remaining barbecue sauce over top. Discard the old pan and liquid.

Place the new pan back in the smoker and smoke, uncovered, until sauce is a little tacky, 15 to 20 minutes. Don't leave it in too long or you will sacrifice that 'rendered' texture which you have worked so hard to achieve.
Remove from the smoker and serve immediately.

pork-with-vegetables-and-screw-pasta-arg.name: Pork With Vegetables And Screw Pasta
pork-with-vegetables-and-screw-pasta-arg.original_name: Χοιρινό με λαχανικά και βίδες ζυμαρικά

ingredients.item: 1 pieces (300 gr) or we can use cooked pork (cut into pieces)
1 pieces (300 gr) or we can use cooked pork (cut into pieces)

instructions: Finely chop the onion, broccoli and cauliflower into small pieces with a knife.
Rub the carrot into a grater and slice the mushrooms.
Cut the meat into small strips.
Sauté the meat to make the pork taste better with vegetarians and screws.
Heat half the olive oil in a pot.
Sauté the meat for 5 minutes, until golden and add the onion.
Sauté for 3 minutes.
Add the carrot.
Add the tomatoes (broken) and some water to cover the ingredients.
Simmer for 10 minutes and add salt and pepper.
In a deep pan, heat the remaining olive oil and sauté the garlic and mushrooms over high heat for 3 minutes.
Add the broccoli and cauliflower to very small pieces and sauce for 3 minutes.
Add the balsamic cream and caramelize the vegetables.
Add salt and pepper and add them to the sauce that has already boiled for 10 minutes.
Sprinkle with some thyme and simmer for 6-7 minutes.
We're checking the salt and pepper.

portuguese-braised-chicken.name: Portuguese Braised Chicken
instructions: {'step': '1', 'instruction': 'Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add sausage, onion, and bell pepper; saute until vegetables are softened and sausage is browned, about 10 minutes.'}
{'step': '2', 'instruction': 'Remove with a slotted spoon to a plate, leaving drippings in the pot.'}

{'step': '3', 'instruction': 'Combine oregano, basil, salt, and pepper in a small bowl and rub on chicken. Add chicken to the pot, raise heat to medium-high, and brown on all sides, about 10 minutes.'}

{'step': '4', 'instruction': 'Stir sausage and vegetable mixture into the pot with wine, broth, bay leaves, and red pepper flakes. Bring to a boil; reduce heat to medium-low and let simmer, covered, until chicken is no longer pink in the centers, 35 to 45 minutes.'}
{'step': '5', 'instruction': 'Remove and discard bay leaves. Serve chicken with orange wedges.'}

portuguese-style-snapper-teleculinaria.name: Portuguese Style Snapper
instructions: Descasque as cebolas e os alhos e lamine-os; limpe o pimento de sementes e corte em tiras finas. Espalhe estes legumes num tabuleiro (cerca de 45x20 cm) e disponha o peixe por cima.
Cut the lemon into slices and insert them into the fish's belly. Season with salt and pepper, water with olive oil and bring it to the oven, preheated at 160oC, for about 30 minutes.
Peel the potatoes, cut them in half and bake them in salty water. Cut the tomatoes in rooms.
Add the cooked potatoes and tomatoes to the fish and put them in the oven for another 20 minutes, increasing the temperature to 180oC. Serve hot, decorated with parsley sticks.

potato-stuffed-poblanos-reverse-potato-s.name: Potato-stuffed Poblanos Reverse Potato Skins
instructions: Mix sour cream, salsa verde, and cilantro together in a bowl until sauce is evenly mixed; refrigerate.
Place potatoes into a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until tender, about 10 minutes. Drain and cool in a large bowl.
Set oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and place peppers on the baking sheet.

Cook under the preheated broiler until the skin of the peppers has blackened and blistered, 3 to 4 minutes. Place blackened peppers into a bowl and tightly seal with plastic wrap. Allow peppers to steam as they cool, about 20 minutes.

Place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Reserve 1 tablespoon bacon grease in the skillet. Drain bacon slices on paper towels and chop.
Combine red bell pepper, onion, and garlic in the skillet with reserved bacon grease; cook and stir over medium heat until vegetables are softened, 4 to 6 minutes.
Mix 1/2 of the bacon, red bell pepper mixture, Cheddar cheese, milk, and butter into the potatoes; mash until well blended.
Remove skins from the roasted poblano peppers. Make a small cut in each pepper and scrape out seeds. Stuff peppers with potato mixture and top with remaining bacon and sauce.

prawn-moilee.name: Prawn Moilee
instructions: Remove and discard the stalks from the chillies, then slice each one into 3 or 4 long strips. Set to one side.
Place a large saucepan over a medium heat. Add 40ml of the oil, let it warm for a few seconds, then add the mustard seeds and 20 curry leaves. Let them crackle for a few seconds.
Add the onions and sauté lightly for 12–14 minutes, until soft but not coloured.
Add the garlic and ginger pastes, salt, black pepper and turmeric and sauté for 3 minutes, stirring regularly. Add the sliced chillies and ginger matchsticks and cook for 3 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and cream and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.

While the curry is simmering, place a small frying pan over a medium-high heat and add the remaining 1 tbsp oil. Toss in the rest of the curry leaves and fry for 1 minute, until crisp. Drain on kitchen paper and set aside.
Add the prawns and tomatoes to the sauce and simmer gently for a further 5–6 minutes, until the prawns are cooked; do not overcook or they will be tough.
Serve scattered with the fried curry leaves, with lemon wedges on the side.

prepare-a-carlota-tricolor-for-that-swee.name: Prepare A Carlota Tricolor For That Sweet Snack
prepare-a-carlota-tricolor-for-that-swee.original_name: Prepara una Carlota Tricolor para ese antojito dulce

ingredients.item: 1 package of shredded tidal type cookies (about 200 g)

instructions: Start with the recipe by placing the cream cheese in a bowl and put it around to an end.
When you get the desired texture, it incorporates condensed milk and lemon juice. Fold well.
Divide la mezcla por igual en 3 recipientes distintos.
He paints one of the green and another of the red with food colors. A few droplets are more than enough, if you wish to add more intensity to the taste, add an extra few drops but without Exciting.
Una vez terminado este paso, debe quedarte tres recipientes de diferentes colores: uno verde, otro rojo y finalmente uno blanco que fue la mezcla que no tinturamos.
In individual vessels, we start by placing enough crisped tidal biscuits, then a cape of green cream, then a cape of white cream and end with a cape of red cream.
Termina la Carlota colocando una capa de galleta y finalmente decora con dibujos animados previamente recortados y sostenidos de palillos.

prepare-an-exquisite-pappardelle-with-sq.name: Prepare An Exquisite Pappardelle With Squid Ink
prepare-an-exquisite-pappardelle-with-sq.original_name: Prepara una exquisita pappardelle con tinta de calamar

In an extensive frying pan, it heats up olive oil and pits and garlic till they are translucent.
Add cramps and paddle for about 3 minutes with medium-high heat till they change color. Don't overcook them.
Add tomato paste, squid ink, pint of sugar, pepperoncino and mix well.
Fold with the white wine and let reduce the fluid by half.
Incorporates 1 / 3 cup of cooking water from the dough to release the salsa.
Add the lemon frying and tighten the bowl with salt and pepper.

Sirve caliente, espolvorea perejil fresco y pan rallado tostado si deseas un contraste crujiente.
He goes with a glass of white or dry sparkling wine to highlight flavors.

prepare-buckwheat-risotto-with-vegetable.name: Prepare Buckwheat Risotto With Vegetables
prepare-buckwheat-risotto-with-vegetable.original_name: Prepara risotto de trigo sarraceno con verduras
instructions: Lava varias veces el trigo sarraceno hasta que el agua salga limpia.
Pela la cebolla y corta en cuadritos.
Filetea los dientes de ajo.
Wash the cherry tomatoes and cut them in half. Finely scrape the mushrooms.
Warm up a pint with two tablespoons of olive oil and fry onion and garlic teeth for a few minutes.
Incorporates mushrooms and cherry tomatoes, and pits without much movement so that both ingredients do not shed so much water.
If you see that she's missing some more oil, add another spoonful.
When the vegetables are salted, add the washed Saracene wheat. Mix and cook for 5 minutes.
Vierte el vino blanco, mezcla y cocina hasta que el alcohol se evapore.
Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto, mezcla y baja el fuego.

At this stage, you have to progressively put up the hot vegetable stock so that the wheat gets cooked. Remember, you mustn't stop minting while cooking. The secret is to avoid letting wheat dry and add stock again.
The cooking will take about 20 minutes. When you have a creamy mixture and the wheat's soft, add parmesan cheese. Meg and put out.
Serves hot risotto and scuba with a little more olive oil and parmesan cheese. Enjoy!

instructions: Pela la zanahoria y ralla.
Take back the ends of the pumpkin, wash and shattering. Once ready, run well to remove the excess of fluid.
In a bowl, place the carrot and pumpkins. It also incorporates the broccoli, onion and garlic tooth. That's a good mix.
Agrega el huevo, la sal y pimienta al gusto. El comino, perejil y cilantro. Mezcla hasta que todo se integre.
Incorpora el pan molido y la harina de trigo. Mezcla hasta integrar y te quede una masa moldeable.
Refrigera la masa por 20 minutos para que se compacte un poco.
After that time, it forms balls the size of a nut or as you prefer. Refrigerate for 10 minutes.
Warm a frying pan with vegetable oil.
Fry the balls for 3 to 4 minutes or till golden.
Once ready, remove from frying pan and place onto absorbing paper to drain the oil surplus.
Serves hot or tibia and goes with your favorite sauce.
Enjoy!

prepare-the-tripe-for-your-family-comede.name: Prepare The Tripe For Your Family

Drop the water from the moist, put the mondong into a water and salt pressure pot and cook till it's soft. If you don't have this instrument, you can do it in a regular pot, but for 2 hours or till I have the required texture. When I'm ready, you'll get him to get his water out.

It cuts onion, chiles, onions and garlic into strips or julians. Place to heat up a large frying pan with oil to soften the vegetables till they are soft. Once at the point, you'll add the broken mondong. Revolved to integrate everything.
To be seasoned! Add all spices, next to the vegetable stock or cube, tomato sauce, capers, olives and some water. Remove everything to integrate flavors and cover for 30 minutes to finish cooking.

After this time, you will uncover and add the cilantro to finish cooking. Just leave him for about 5 more minutes or till his fluids are a little reduced. Since it's a steamed version, you have to have salsa. The mondingo texture should be very soft and soft.
We're done!

pressure-cooker-sweet-potatoes.name: Pressure Cooker Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Cut sweet potatoes in half, lengthwise, then into 1/4-inch slices; place into a pressure cooker steamer basket. Sprinkle with salt.
Combine brown sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a small bowl.
Add orange juice to the cooker (see Editor's Note, below). Place the trivet and steamer basket with sweet potatoes into the pot. Sprinkle with brown sugar mixture; dot with butter pieces.

Lock the lid into place and bring the cooker up to full pressure (15 pounds per square inch) over high heat according to manufacturer's instructions. Once pressure reached, reduce heat to low; cook 7 minutes
Quickly release pressure according to manufacturer's instructions. Reserve cooking liquid.

Remove steamer basket from cooker; carefully place sweet potatoes in a serving dish. Return cooker to stovetop; bring cooking liquid to a boil over high heat. Reduce the heat to medium; simmer, stirring frequently, until cooking liquid reduced, syrupy, and coats the back of a spoon, 5 to 7 minutes.
Pour syrup over sweet potatoes; serve.

prime-rib-roast-with-habanero-crema.name: Prime Rib Roast With Habanero Crema

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: chine bone removed, fat trimmed to  0.25", tied with kitchen twine

ingredients.item: . plus 1 tsp. diamond crystal or 4 tsp. morton kosher salt fresh bay leaves
A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions:
Blend chile, sour cream, cilantro, horseradish, lime juice, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper in a blender until smooth. Transfer to a small bowl and chill until ready to use.
Do Ahead: Crema can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 325°. Coarsely grind fennel seeds, garlic powder, caraway seeds, thyme, paprika, and peppercorns in a spice mill or with a mortar and pestle. Place roast on a rimmed baking sheet. Rub with oil and season all over with salt. Sprinkle spice rub over, ensuring all sides of beef are coated. Chill roast, uncovered, 8 hours.

Heat a dry large cast-iron skillet over medium-high; cook beef until browned, about 4 minutes per side. Transfer skillet to oven and roast beef until an instant-read thermometer registers 120°–125°, about 2 hours. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest 20 minutes.
Transfer roast to a platter; tuck bay leaves around if desired. Serve sliced with habanero crema.

pumpkin-cheesecake-bars-with-streusel.name: Pumpkin Cheesecake Bars With Streusel
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a 11x15-inch baking pan with aluminum foil.

Combine flour, baking soda, salt, and brown sugar in a bowl. Cut in butter using a pastry blender or 2 forks until crust mixture is crumbly. Press 2/3 of the mixture evenly into the prepared baking pan. Reserve remainder for the streusel topping.
Bake crust in the preheated oven until lightly browned, about 15 minutes. Let cool, about 10 minutes.

Combine cream cheese, pumpkin puree, and white sugar in a bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth. Beat in eggs one at a time. Stir vanilla and pumpkin pie spice into the filling mixture. Pour over the cooled crust.
Mix reserved crust mixture and walnuts together in a small bowl make streusel topping. Sprinkle streusel topping over the filling.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is set, 40 to 45 minutes. Refrigerate until firm, at least 2 hours. Cut into bars.

pumpkin-omelet-teleculinaria.name: Pumpkin Omelet
instructions: Cut the pumpkin into small cubes and reserve. Beat the eggs and add a pinch of salt and chopped parsley, chopped onion and curd. Hit again, until it's well mixed, then add the pumpkin and yeast and stir
Lay in a form, previously greased with butter and sprinkled with flour, sprinkle with grated cheese and light in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for 30 minutes. Serve the hot omelet, cut into squares.

pumpkin-pie-with-brown-sugar-walnut-topp.name: Pumpkin Pie With Brown Sugar-walnut Topping
instructions: Combine all ingredients. Using on/off turns, blend to fine crumbs. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Store in airtight container at room temperature.
Position oven rack in bottom third of oven; preheat to 177°C. Transfer crust to 9-inch-diameter glass pie dish. Fold edges under and crimp decoratively. Freeze crust 20 minutes.

Line crust with nonstick foil and fill with dried beans or pie weights. Bake until crust is set, about 20 minutes. Gently remove foil and beans. Return crust to oven and bake until partially cooked and golden brown around edges, pressing down on crust with back of spoon if bubbles form, about 15 minutes. Cool crust on rack. Maintain oven temperature.
Whisk brown sugar, eggs, sea salt, cinnamon, ginger, and cloves in medium bowl. Add pumpkin and cream and whisk until well blended and smooth.
Pour filling into crust. Bake pie until filling is firm, covering crust with foil collar if browning too quickly, about 30 minutes.

Sprinkle topping evenly over top of pie. Reduce oven temperature to 163°C; continue to bake pie until filling is set and slightly puffed in center, about 15 minutes longer. Transfer pie to rack and cool completely. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Tent with foil and chill. Let stand at room temperature 1 hour before serving.

pumpkin-pie-with-yellow-savory-pumpkin-a.name: Pumpkin Pie With Yellow Savory Pumpkin

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 cup of flower that inflates alone
11⁄2 cup of flower that inflates alone

instructions: Beat eggs with olive oil with a wire or a mixer in a bowl.
Add the fresh onions, dill, salt, pepper and kefalotiri.
In a basin, place the pumpkins finely chopped.
Sprinkle them with flour and mix them very well until completely covered and floured.
Pour the floured pumpkins with the egg mixture.
We mix very well.
We oil a long fire resistant vessel and empty the mixture for the salty pumpkin pie.
Bake at 170
Let it cool and cut into pieces.

pumpkin-coffee-tiramisu.name: Pumpkin-coffee Tiramisu
instructions: {'level': '1', 'description': 'In a large bowl or a stand mixer fitted with the whisk, combine 1 1/2 cups cream, mascarpone, pumpkin, 1/2 cup sugar, and pumpkin spice. Beat on high speed with a hand mixer or on medium-high speed in the stand mixer until stiffly whipped.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'In a medium bowl, beat remaining 1/2 cup heavy cream with 1 tablespoon sugar until stiffly whipped.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'In a small bowl, stir together coffee, rum, and remaining 1 tablespoon sugar.'}

{'level': '1', 'description': 'Have ready 6 approximately 4-inch wide cups or ramekins. Dip ladyfingers in coffee mixture and line cups or ramekins with a single layer. Depending on size of cups or ramekins, ladyfingers may need to be cut shorter with a serrated knife.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Top with a layer of pumpkin mixture. Top with another layer of soaked ladyfingers and another layer of pumpkin mixture.'}
{'level': '1', 'description': 'Top each serving with a generous spoonful of the whipped cream and sprinkle with white chocolate. Serve immediately or refrigerate, covered, up to 1 day.'}
